witchs_cackle.name: Witch's Cackle
witchs_cackle.description: Setup/Builder: A chilling laugh that unnerves the target. Generates 15 Concentration and 1 Curse Pip.

curse_of_misfortune.name: Curse of Misfortune
curse_of_misfortune.description: Setup: Hex the target with pure bad luck. Generates 1 Curse Pip and applies [Blindness].

voodoo_puncture.name: Voodoo Puncture
voodoo_puncture.description: Payoff: Stab a spectral doll to deal massive internal damage. Consumes 5 Curse Pips.

cauldron_eruption.name: Cauldron Eruption
cauldron_eruption.description: Payoff/AOE: Spew toxic brew into the air. Consumes 3 Curse Pips to deal AOE magic damage and apply [Poisoned].

obsidian_ward.name: Obsidian Ward
obsidian_ward.description: Defense: Surround yourself with ancient obsidian stones. Absorbs physical damage using Concentration.

mist_form.name: Mist Form
mist_form.description: Defense/Mobility: Briefly dissolve into a noxious mist to evade danger.

broomstick_flight.name: Broomstick Flight
broomstick_flight.description: Mobility: Fly over obstacles and move between rooms instantly.

grand_hex_of_ruin.name: Grand Hex
grand_hex_of_ruin.description: Utility/Signature: For 30 ticks, all enemies in the zone deal 50% less damage and take 50% more magic damage.

witch_physiology.name: Witch Physiology
witch_physiology.description: Passive: Cauldron Master. Your potions are twice as effective and your Curse generation is increased by 10% for every debuff on the target.
